preamble: A journey from the back of the mouth to the front, this transformation often occurs when back vowels are pulled forward by neighboring sounds or as part of a general vowel shift toward the front of the oral cavity.

examples.note: Development of /y/ from earlier /u/ and its subsequent merger with /i/
I-mutation fronted /u:/ to /y:/, which later unrounded to /i:/ (Great Vowel Shift followed)

sources: Campbell, L. (2013). Historical Linguistics: An Introduction.
